prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 107.4 kg; Height 180.1 cm; BMI 33.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 145/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.6%; 6 months ago 9.1%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 214mg/dL; 9 months ago 231mg/dL; 6 months ago 255mg/dL; 3 months ago 211mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 107.8kg; 9 months ago 105.8kg; 6 months ago 103.1kg; 3 months ago 104.9kg; current 107.4kg), Height (12 months ago 180.1cm; 9 months ago 180.1cm; 6 months ago 180.1cm; 3 months ago 180.1cm; current 180.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 145mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 145mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 99U/L; 9 months ago 96U/L; 6 months ago 100U/L; 3 months ago 94U/L; current 101U/L), AST (12 months ago 62U/L; 9 months ago 53U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 53U/L; current 57U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 865mg/g; 9 months ago 915mg/g; 6 months ago 692mg/g; 3 months ago 1077mg/g; current 992mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
